codeReview.summary: Pass. The commit makes AUTH-09 and ADMIN-14 merge-gate eligible by tagging both regression classes as critical and adding both classes to the explicit pr-fast/gate-fast Surefire include lists, while the R2 checkpoint update records packet-specific approval and gate evidence. I found no blocking or non-blocking implementation defects in the reviewed diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Gate-fast's catalog/flaky artifacts only inspect the truthsuite tree, so merge-lane tests added through explicit Surefire includes outside truthsuite are not independently discoverable from catalog-validation.json or flake-guard.json.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: scripts/gate_fast.sh:6 defines TRUTH_TEST_ROOT as erp-domain/src/test/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/truthsuite, and lines 289-301 pass that root to validate_test_catalog.py and check_flaky_tags.py. The reviewed packet adds non-truthsuite includes at erp-domain/pom.xml:555-557 and 605-607 for AdminUserSecurityIT and AuthPasswordResetPublicContractIT.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The security-backend-worker skill is more prescriptive than this gate-only packet needed, and transcript compliance tracking did not reflect that mismatch. The skill requires a compile step and frontend-v2 review, but the worker transcript omitted both while handoff.skillFeedback still marked followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/security-backend-worker/SKILL.md:51-63 requires `mvn compile -q` plus frontend-handoff/frontend-v2 shared-knowledge review. The session 12cd9f51-a6f8-46ee-81a1-4c74c4b4c0e8 transcript skeleton shows reads for auth-hardening.md and frontend-handoff.md, but no frontend-v2 read and no compile command before handoff; the handoff JSON still records skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true.

summary: Reviewed commit 80fab95280974a4984190f3986515fe5e841a0ce for auth-merge-gate-regression-coverage and found the feature implementation acceptable. No blocking findings; shared-state follow-up is limited to catalog/skill guidance gaps rather than defects in the packet itself.
